windowsShellSmokeSectionTitle: Windows Explorer (context menu and Open with)
windowsShellSmokePrereq0: Packaged Velorix.exe (or dev on Windows); a .mp4/.mkv video on disk.
windowsShellSmokePrereq1: Settings → Dependencies → «Windows Explorer» block is visible (Windows only).
windowsShellSmokePrereq2: HKCU write allowed (no policy blocking Explorer context menus).
windowsShellSmokeStep_enable_menu: Enable «Explorer context menu» → «Register now»; status shows registered.
windowsShellSmokeStep_context_open: Right-click video → «Open in Velorix» — main window opens the file in the editor.
windowsShellSmokeStep_quick_mp4: (Optional) Right-click → quick MP4 — export without full UI (workflow/shell log).
windowsShellSmokeStep_open_with: Enable «Open with» → «Register»; Velorix appears in the Open with list.
windowsShellSmokePass0: A second shell-open while the app is running does not spawn another process.
windowsShellSmokePass1: NSIS install/uninstall (if testing the installer) — register/unregister without errors in the log.
windowsShellSmokePass2: Support ZIP includes ownerManualSmoke: with the shell block (on Windows).
